prompt:
SAME WOMAN AS REFERENCE IMAGE.
Standing atop a luxury rooftop above neon Tokyo.

Cyber-kimono couture.

Black silk.

Gold embroidery.

Architectural shoulder pieces.

Luxury visor.

Handbag held like a sacred artifact.

One foot forward.

Strong warrior stance.

Wind moving sleeves and hair.

Environment blends:

Ukiyo-e,
Cyberpunk,
Luxury branding,
High fashion editorial photography.

Massive holographic dragons coil between skyscrapers.

Floating calligraphy and luxury typography integrated into the skyline.

Color palette:

black lacquer,
vermilion,
gold leaf,
electric cyan.

Photorealistic face.
Natural skin texture.
Luxury campaign photography.
Aspect ratio 9:16
